_notes: Baseline for the chorus-test-revA routing benchmark.
Re-pinned by Issue #3474 Phase 0 (2026-06-10, HEAD d45ded4d) when
the fixture migrated from chorus-test-revA_v18.kicad_pcb to
chorus-test-revA_v21_stripped.kicad_pcb.  v18/v19 predate the
chorus repo's 2026-05-11 netlist repair (commit 5b59e20) and the
Phase 0 U1/U2 regulator-connectivity restoration; routing them to
100% would be fake-manufacturable.
nets_total = 51 is the multi-pad signal-net count from the
v21_stripped PCB after skipping the five power/ground nets in the
case config (+3.3V, +3.3VA, +5V, GNDA, GNDD).  See cases.py.
Measurement provenance: re-pinned by Issue #3883 (Wave-11,
2026-07-02) to the DETERMINISTIC full route_chorus.py recipe.  The
prior baseline (2/51 strict, 30 partial, 19 unrouted, 101 DRC) was
measured on the pre-#3881 budget-starved recipe and is stale.  New
provenance: PYTHONHASHSEED=0 uv run python scripts/route_chorus.py
(R2_RECIPE_FLAGS: --manufacturer jlcpcb-tier1 --backend cpp --layers
4 --no-auto-layers --micro-via-in-pad-fallback --deterministic-budget
--per-net-iterations 1000000 --placement-feedback
--placement-feedback-budget 5 --iterations 50 --auto-fix
--auto-fix-passes 2 --timeout 1200 --seed 42) + completion + rescue
stages.  Result: 30/51 strict, 21 partial, 0 unrouted, 32
non-connectivity DRC errors.  This is a reproducible run-to-run
deterministic number (the #3881 per-net iteration cap makes reach
load-independent).  See tests/test_chorus_reach_floor_3237.py
CHORUS_V21_WAVE11_* constants for the full four-variant M2/M3 record.
M2/M3 null result: --joint-region-resolve and --placement-nudge were
measured (both flags, and both together) and NEITHER improved strict
reach off 30/51, so neither graduated into the production recipe.
Justify any decrease in nets_fully_routed or increase in
nets_unrouted in the PR description per docs (update procedure
unchanged).  The previous v18-era baseline (26/46 routed, 8
unrouted, issue #2611) is preserved in git history under version
'issue-2611-initial'.
